purpose: Port the terminal meaning of Program O relevant-risk v1.1 without changing its STOP or treating its incomplete screen as Program S evidence.

verified_stage_results.G1_stochastic_incidence: R21 zero events; R22 only partial operation coverage

scientific_boundary: The stop does not establish risk invariance of Program O.
It does not estimate frequency sensitivity, impact sensitivity, risk x product interactions, or timing interactions.
Program S repairs the instrument prospectively by separating deterministic liveness from stochastic incidence.
